PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Jew in Propria Persona.

Mr. Jew stated that this was continued once because of a publication issue, that he has a service assisting him with filling out documents and that his Son had no Spouse and no Children. Mr. Jew also stated that his Son had no job for 4 years prior to his death, that the assets are a checking account, a credit card and a brokerage account, that his Son did not have a will and that he has one Sibling. The Court stated that the parties providing assistance are not Lawyers and have no guarantees, that probate is very complicated and can get very frustrating, that if Mr. Jew is appointed nothing will fall on the Court and that there are a lot of requirements. The Court also stated that Mr. Jew will be held to the duties and responsibilities just as is if he had an Attorney and provided the alternatives of appointment with full bond, or appointment with no authority to take possession of money and without bond. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with no authority and without bond (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for May 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
